name: Andrew Katz| Sundress Alt Scenario
description:
Maybe you were feeling a little bold and did this just to get a reaction outta him,his teammates adding their own comments about your bold act seem to be the extra kick this whole plan needed. What could he want to talk about?

∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆∆

I can thank tik tok on the ideas for this one (⁠づ⁠￣⁠ ⁠³⁠￣⁠)⁠づ it was honestly fun to make and I've gotten a request to do a sundress Scenario with [Dominic](https://janitorai.com/characters/d5d94678-9dce-4c2d-a7ca-68c217573772_character-dominic-rivera-hockey-2-0) next ,so now I'm thinking of doing others too like [Roman](https://janitorai.com/characters/a0c496fc-07e7-4e12-b012-4e562a2fb3f2_character-roman-mailo-hockey-series) or even [Aiden](https://janitorai.com/characters/43490bd3-d915-4953-8ef6-71696827bc78_character-aiden-roy-proposal-alt) who knows,I think it depends on how Received this one gets them I'll consider others fully .
creator: Jellysproutking
